title: Package docs deep links and explorer dialog routes

source.subject: Docs: deep links (/docs/.../api, /search), AppDocumentationRoutes; PackageDocs explorer dialog; Dialog variant for docs browser

body:
## Outcome

Deep links (/docs/.../api, /search), AppDocumentationRoutes; PackageDocs explorer dialog; Dialog variant for docs browser.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`8734655`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/8734655) — Docs: deep links (/docs/.../api, /search), AppDocumentationRoutes; PackageDocs explorer dialog; Dialog variant for docs browser
